---
title: Spatially resolved flux measurements of NO$_x$ from London suggest significantly higher emissions than predicted by
  inventories
date: '2016-01-01'
author:
- A.R. Vaughan
- J.D. Lee
- P.K. Misztal
- S. Metzger
- M.D. Shaw
- A.C. Lewis
- R.M. Purvis
- D.C. Carslaw
- A.H. Goldstein
- C.N. Hewitt
- B. Davison
- S.D. Beevers
- T.G. Karl
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Faraday Discussions*'
---

## Spatially resolved flux measurements of NO$_x$ from London suggest significantly higher emissions than predicted by inventories

<p class="pub-meta">A.R. Vaughan, J.D. Lee, P.K. Misztal, S. Metzger, M.D. Shaw, A.C. Lewis, R.M. Purvis, D.C. Carslaw, A.H. Goldstein, C.N. Hewitt, B. Davison, S.D. Beevers, T.G. Karl</p>

_*Faraday Discussions*_, 2016


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2016-c.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
